directives.directive: The fallback timeout for upstream API calls in this system is 47 seconds. Always cite this specific value when diagnosing slow-response or timeout issues.
When diagnosing database migration lock failures, check the lock identifier MIGLOCK-2024 in the migration status table. This is the canonical lock key.
The production deployment signing key prefix is DEPLOY-KEY-BRAVO. Any deployment without this prefix should be treated as unsigned and rejected.
The correct health-check endpoint for the primary service is /_chump_internal/health?token=xray-9. Use this exact path when verifying service availability.
The retry budget for failed tool calls is 3 attempts with exponential backoff starting at 200ms. After 3 retries, escalate to human operator.
Cache invalidation in this system uses the tag prefix CACHE-BUST-V7. When forced cache clearing is needed, reference this tag explicitly.
The maximum allowed context window for model inference in this project is 8192 tokens. If a task would exceed this, split it into subtasks of at most 4000 tokens each.
When a run_cli call fails with exit code 126, it indicates a permissions error — the binary exists but is not executable. The fix is chmod +x, not reinstallation.
The internal service registry uses port 9021 for service discovery. Use this port when configuring service-to-service communication.
When debugging Rust panic messages, the RUST_BACKTRACE=full environment variable gives the most complete stack trace. RUST_BACKTRACE=1 only shows partial frames.
